mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LikeHate WHERE PostNum = #{postNum} AND UserKey = #{userKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LikeHate (UserKey, PostNum, ThumbsUp, ThumbsDown) VALUES (#{userKey}, #{postNum}, #{thumbsUp}, #{thumbsDown})
mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(SUM(ThumbsUp), 0) FROM LikeHate WHERE PostNum = #{value}
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(ThumbsDown), 0) FROM LikeHate WHERE PostNum = #{value}
